name_en: Platinum Edition▪️ Authentic Quality Packaging as shown
name_cn:
Platinum Edition▪️ Authentic Quality Packaging as shown
Chane1 25P Fully Upgraded Version 🍀
Double Pocket Frog 🐸 Retro Backpack Light Grey Medium
Purchased from a counter for 49800rmb development〰️
The retro backpack has always been a highlight ꫛꫀꪝ
The 23P version of this awaited grain calfskin~
The look is a classic type, the retro vibe is instantly captivating ♥
Double pocket small schoolbag grain calfskin is always the most popular material.
Easy to maintain and durable, perfect for daily commuting and storage ✔️
Hardware: Full steel 14K pale gold buckle
Leather: Haas medium ball calfskin
Size: 20.5*20*11.5 CM
